description:
A new Android application release is being prepared in the CI pipeline and you, as the mobile build engineer, need to generate a concise summary of the essential build-time parameters for downstream jobs.

    1. An INI file already exists at:
       /home/user/mobile_build/config/app_build.ini

    2. Read the following INI keys:
       • build_flavor           (section [build])  
       • min_sdk                (section [build])  
       • target_sdk             (section [build])  
       • version_name           (section [version])  
       • version_code           (section [version])  

    3. Create (or overwrite if it already exists) the file:
       /home/user/mobile_build/logs/latest_build.conf

       The file must contain **exactly** the five lines shown below, in this order, all in UPPER-CASE key names, followed by a single UNIX newline at the very end of the file:

       BUILD_FLAVOR=<value_from_ini>
       MIN_SDK=<value_from_ini>
       TARGET_SDK=<value_from_ini>
       VERSION_NAME=<value_from_ini>
       VERSION_CODE=<value_from_ini>

       Example of correct formatting (values will differ):
       BUILD_FLAVOR=production
       MIN_SDK=21
       TARGET_SDK=34
       VERSION_NAME=2.3.5
       VERSION_CODE=235⏎   ← there must be a newline after the last line

    4. No additional text, spacing, comments, blank lines or terminal output should be written into latest_build.conf—only the five required lines exactly as specified.

    You are expected to accomplish this with a small set of shell commands (roughly two to three commands is enough, but use as many as you feel are necessary). When you are done, verify that /home/user/mobile_build/logs/latest_build.conf exists and matches the required format and values.
truth:
<!-- Initial filesystem state -->
    Directory /home/user/mobile_build/ already exists and contains:
      • config/      (0700 perms)
      • logs/        (0700 perms)

    File: /home/user/mobile_build/config/app_build.ini
    ---------------------------------------------------
    [build]
    build_flavor=production
    min_sdk=21
    target_sdk=34

    [version]
    version_name=2.3.5
    version_code=235
    ---------------------------------------------------

    No file named latest_build.conf exists at start.

    <!-- Expected artefact for automated grading -->
    After successful task completion the grader will look for:
    File: /home/user/mobile_build/logs/latest_build.conf
    Exact byte-for-byte content expected (including trailing newline):

    BUILD_FLAVOR=production
    MIN_SDK=21
    TARGET_SDK=34
    VERSION_NAME=2.3.5
    VERSION_CODE=235

    (There is a single 0x0A newline character after “235”.)
